# Airflow DAGs Directory
# =======================
# This directory contains generated Airflow DAG files.
# 
# DAG files are automatically generated by NovaSight when users
# deploy their DAG configurations through the visual DAG builder.
#
# DO NOT manually edit files in this directory as they will be
# overwritten on the next deployment.
#
# Structure:
#   tenant_{tenant_id}/
#       dag_{dag_id}.py
